events.text: Own Goal by Yassine Bounou, Morocco. Morocco 0, Haiti 1.
Goal! Morocco 1, Haiti 1. Achraf Hakimi (Morocco) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal.
Goal! Morocco 1, Haiti 2. Wilson Isidor (Haiti) right footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Jean-Kévin Duverne.
Goal! Morocco 2, Haiti 2. Ismael Saibari (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Achraf Hakimi.
Substitution, Haiti. Duckens Nazon replaces Ruben Providence.
Substitution, Haiti. Louicius Deedson replaces Wilson Isidor.
Substitution, Morocco. Soufiane Rahimi replaces Ismael Saibari.
Substitution, Morocco. Azzedine Ounahi replaces Brahim Díaz.
Substitution, Morocco. Gessime Yassine replaces Ayoub El Kaabi.
Goal! Morocco 3, Haiti 2. Soufiane Rahimi (Morocco) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Chadi Riad following a corner.
Johny Placide (Haiti) is shown the yellow card.
Duckens Nazon (Haiti) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Haiti. Carlens Arcus replaces Jean-Kévin Duverne.
Substitution, Haiti. Dominique Simon replaces Danley Jean Jacques.
Substitution, Morocco. Noussair Mazraoui replaces Anass Salah-Eddine.
Substitution, Morocco. Samir El Mourabet replaces Neil El Aynaoui.
Substitution, Haiti. Frantzdy Pierrot replaces Lenny Joseph.
Goal! Morocco 4, Haiti 2. Gessime Yassine (Morocco) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Soufiane Rahimi.
Josué Casimir (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
